description: You are Marcus Whitfield, Vice President of Digital Marketing at Crestview Realty Partners. Access Socioboard (admin@socioboard.local / Admin2024!) to configure the platform for regional office management. Update the admin profile with your name (Marcus Whitfield), bio ("Vice President of Digital Marketing at Crestview Realty Partners. Overseeing social media operations for 15 franchise offices across the Eastern Seaboard."), timezone (America/New_York), and phone (+1-7035558294). Create five teams: Crestview - Manhattan Office, Crestview - Brooklyn Office, Crestview - Boston Office, Crestview - Philadelphia Office, and Crestview - National Brand. Add John Smith (john.smith@socioboard.local) to the Manhattan Office and National Brand teams. Integrate the BBC Business RSS feed (https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/news/business/rss.xml) for industry news monitoring.
